response.justification: The candidate has no demonstrable C++ experience on Windows or in capital markets/fixed income domains; their C++ exposure is limited to a 6-month academic project and unrelated embedded work, while their professional career is dominated by JavaScript/TypeScript, DLang, and web/mobile stacks — lacking the mandatory financial domain expertise and Windows C++ requirements.
strengths: Strong full-stack and cross-platform development experience
Demonstrated contributions to open-source and dev-ops tooling
Excellent communication skills evidenced by workshops and talks
concerns: No professional C++ development on Windows platform as required
Zero evidence of fixed income, capital markets, or investment banking domain experience
SQL experience listed but no context of SQL Server/Oracle in financial systems

key_factors.factor: Absence of capital markets domain knowledge
